sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35123" key="e(ndeka/klinos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑνδεκᾰ´-κλῑνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n35123.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with eleven couches</tr_>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κεφαλὴ ἑ</foreign>. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">big enough to hold eleven couches</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0510.tlg001:44" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Telecl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">44</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
